Found in benchmarks/cua_world/environments/drupal_commerce_env/scripts/seed_products.php line 45. This is a custom task-created SKU, not the official Sony SKU. Official Sony model designation is WH-1000XM5 or WH1000XM5/B (by color variant).
task.json description line 5 specifies 'Product News' as one of the taxonomy terms to create and the category for the sample blog post
task.json description line 5 specifies creating a View page accessible at /store-blog

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic Drupal Commerce environment task that requires agents to create a taxonomy vocabulary named 'Blog Categories' with three terms (Product News, Deals & Offers, Tech Tips), a content type 'Store Blog Post' with two entity reference fields (field_featured_product and field_blog_category), a published blog post titled 'Top 5 Headphones for 2024' referencing the product 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) with category 'Product News', and a view at /store-blog. The product is a real product (Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones) created via the environment's seed script with a custom task-created SKU, not an official Sony SKU.
